# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    strategy:
      matrix:
        node-version: [14, 16]
        python-version: [3.8, 3.9]

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: ${{ matrix.node-version }}

    - name: Cache Node.js modules
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: node_modules
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-npm-cache-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-npm-cache-

    - name: Install Node.js dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: ${{ matrix.python-version }}

    - name: Install Python dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Cache Python packages
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: ~/.cache/pip
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

    - name: Cache Configurations
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: .config/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ hashFiles('**/*.config', '**/*.yml', '**/*.yaml') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-config- 

    - name: Build Project
      run: |
        npm run build
        python setup.py install

    - name: Cache Build Outputs
      uses: actions/cache@v2
      with:
        path: build/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ hashFiles('**/build/**') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-build-

    - name: Run Tests
      run: npm test && pytest
